backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Higgins Music Hub backend, defining all core data types (Membership, PublishingWork, Release, RecordingProject, ArtistDevelopment) and persistent storage with CRUD operations, authorization mixins, and cross-entity linking.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles to the frontend files, component dependencies, and test IDs that implement each requirement, covering create/edit flows for all five portal entity types.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Aggregated one-paragraph summaries of every frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of hooks, components, and page files in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind layers and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, sidebar, chart, and destructive colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Higgins Music app that mounts a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/ROLL_OUT_21_7_EXECUTION_LOG.md: Timestamped execution log for Rollout 21.7 (Step 9.5) recording pre-deployment checks, build/upgrade steps, and post-upgrade verification evidence for the frontend and backend canister.
frontend/ROLL_OUT_21_7_STEP_9_5_ARTIFACT: Companion artifact store for the Rollout 21.7 execution log, intended to hold verbatim command outputs, build logs, and deployment pipeline excerpts that are too long for the main log.
frontend/ROLLOUT_STEPS.md: Single source of truth for remaining rollout steps (Steps 10–12), detailing deployment to ICP mainnet, post-launch refinements, and long-term maintenance tasks with acceptance criteria and references.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_1_21_2.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for Rollout 21.1–21.2, covering landing page load, authentication, all five portal detail routes, Edit Links dialogs, and both admin and non-admin member scenarios.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_3_21_4.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.3–21.4 of the Higgins Music Hub, covering landing page load, authentication, all five portal detail routes, and Edit Links dialogs for both admin and non-admin approved member roles.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_5_21_6.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.5–21.6, nearly identical in structure to 21.3–21.4, verifying landing page, auth gates, five detail routes, and Edit Links dialogs for both user roles.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_7_SESSION_LOG.md: Structured session log template for the rollout 21.7 smoke test, capturing test user principals, entity IDs, console output, and per-role pass/fail outcomes during execution.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_7.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.7, extending prior checklists with explicit AuthGate/ApprovalGate verification steps and a requirement to record entity IDs in a companion session log file.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_STEP_10_MAINNET.md: Comprehensive smoke test checklist for the Step 10 ICP mainnet deployment, verifying landing page, authentication flows, all five portal detail routes, and Edit Links dialogs for both admin and non-admin approved member roles in production.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree and React Query client for the app, wiring all portal, admin, and detail routes under a shared PortalLayout with theme and toast providers.
frontend/src/components/admin/PortalAudi: Admin-only component that renders a grouped, prioritized summary of incomplete portal sections sourced from a portalAudit utility, displaying findings with priority badges and icons in a card grid.
frontend/src/components/auth/ApprovalGat: Approval gate component that is temporarily bypassed to always render children unconditionally, with the original approval-check logic preserved in comments for easy reversion.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the landing page and shows a spinner while Internet Identity is initializing or logging in.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component that triggers Internet Identity login or logout, clears the React Query cache on sign-out, and handles the already-authenticated edge case.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, email, and bio, then saves the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/feedback/AccessD: Centered card component that displays an access-denied message with a shield icon and a prompt to contact an administrator.
frontend/src/components/feedback/EmptySt: Reusable empty-state UI component that renders an optional icon, title, description, and an optional action button in a centered layout.
frontend/src/components/feedback/ErrorBa: Renders a destructive alert banner with user-friendly error messages, converting backend 'Unauthorized' and 'not found' errors into readable text.
frontend/src/components/feedback/Loading: Displays a full-screen centered skeleton loading placeholder with multiple skeleton rows.
frontend/src/components/feedback/Section: Renders a dashed-border placeholder card indicating unbuilt portal sections, styled by priority level (high/medium/low) with an icon and badge.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandHead: Sticky top header with the Higgins Music logo/brand name that navigates to home on click, with an optional login button.
frontend/src/components/layout/PortalLay: Main portal layout with a collapsible sidebar navigation, role-based menu filtering (admin-only items), and logout functionality using TanStack Router and React Query.
frontend/src/components/related/EditLink: Simple outline button component with a link icon that triggers an edit links action.
frontend/src/components/related/EditRela: Modal dialog for editing cross-entity relationships (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects) using multi-select lists with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/related/MultiSel: Filterable scrollable checklist component for selecting multiple entities by ID, with a search input and selected count display.
frontend/src/components/related/relatedR: Utility functions that determine edit permissions for various record types by comparing the caller's principal against the record owner or membership principal, with admin override support.
frontend/src/components/related/RelatedR: Displays linked related records (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects) as clickable badges, resolving IDs to labels from caller entities data.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Custom hook that fetches the current user's role and approval status from the backend actor, exposing convenience flags like `isAdmin` and `isApproved`.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkableEntityOpti: Custom hook that builds dropdown option lists for linkable entities (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects), fetching all records for admins or only caller-owned records for regular users.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend data fetching and mutations, covering user profiles, roles, memberships, publishing works, releases, recording projects, and artist development entities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a warm neutral light/dark color theme used throughout the application.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page component featuring a hero section with sign-in button, a services grid, and a co-operative membership section, redirecting authenticated users to the portal.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/AdminBoo: Displays instructions for bootstrapping the first admin account by appending a secret token to the app URL. Admin-only guard is temporarily disabled for testing.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/AdminDas: Admin dashboard showing counts and recent activity across memberships, publishing works, releases, recording projects, and artist development entries. Admin guard is temporarily disabled.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/RoleAssi: Admin page for viewing all known users and assigning or changing their roles (admin, member, guest) via a dropdown table. Admin guard is temporarily disabled.
frontend/src/pages/portal/artists/Artist: Detail view for a single artist development entry, supporting inline editing of goals, plans, milestones, and notes, plus managing related entity links via a dialog.
List page for artist development entries showing a table of all (admin) or caller-owned entries, with a dialog to create new entries.
frontend/src/pages/portal/label/ReleaseD: Detail view for a single release record, supporting inline editing of title, release type, tracklist, key dates, and workflow checklist, plus managing related entity links.
frontend/src/pages/portal/label/Releases: Displays a list of music releases (all releases for admins, caller's releases otherwise) with a dialog form to create new releases including title, type, tracklist, key dates, and owners.
frontend/src/pages/portal/memberships/Me: Shows detailed view of a single membership record with inline editing of name, email, and status, plus admin-only status changes and a dialog for editing linked related entities.
Lists membership profiles (all for admins, caller's own otherwise) and provides a dialog to create new memberships with name, email, and auto-generated member ID.
frontend/src/pages/portal/publishing/Pub: Renders a detailed view of a publishing work with inline editing of title, registration status, contributors, ownership splits, and notes, plus a dialog for managing linked entities.
Lists publishing works (all for admins, caller's catalog otherwise) and provides a dialog to create new works with title, contributors, ISWC/ISRC codes, and registration status.
frontend/src/pages/portal/recordings/Rec: Detail page for a single recording project, supporting inline editing of title, participants, session date, status, and notes, with permission-gated edit controls and a related-records linking dialog.
List page for recording projects that displays all projects in a table (admin sees all, others see their own) and provides a dialog to create new projects.
frontend/src/utils/arrays.ts: Utility functions for safe array handling, including normalizing unknown values to arrays, checking non-empty arrays, and safely getting array lengths—primarily for upgrade resilience with backend data.
frontend/src/utils/portalAudit.ts: Centralized registry of audit findings (missing or incomplete features) across portal sections, each with an ID, section path, description, and priority, used by placeholder components and the admin dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Provides a single validation function for ownership splits, ensuring at least one split exists and the total percentage does not exceed 100%.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color tokens using OKLCH variables, typography, border radius, box shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
frontend/UPGRADE_LINKING_VERIFICATION_RE: Manual QA checklist template for smoke-testing upgrade-safe related-record linking across five entity detail pages, covering build status, auth flow, portal routes, and Edit Links dialogs for multiple rollout phases.
frontend/UPGRADE_LINKING_VERIFICATION.md: Manual QA checklist for verifying upgrade-safe related-record linking across all five portal detail pages post-canister-upgrade, covering Edit Links dialog behavior and link persistence for both admin and non-admin member roles.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of a portal application project at version 3, listing existing features, known issues, architectural notes, and a summary of work in progress around saving and editing records for each section.
